title: Applied Enough Items
description: Adds JEI-style ingredient sorting to AE2 screens (ME Terminal, ME Chest, etc.)
body:
# Applied Enough Items

Brings the familiar **JEI-style item sorting** directly into **Applied Energistics 2** interfaces — making your ME Terminal, ME Chest, and other AE2 screens easier to navigate and organize.

## ✨ Features

Items in AE2 terminals are automatically sorted using JEI’s intelligent ordering logic:

1. **By Mod** – Items grouped under their respective mod names  
2. **By Ingredient Type** – Items, fluids, etc. categorized logically  
3. **By Creative Tab** – Mirroring Minecraft’s creative inventory layout for intuitive browsing

No configuration needed — just install and enjoy a cleaner, more consistent inventory experience!

## 🧩 Dependencies

This mod requires the following to function:

- [**Applied Energistics 2 (AE2)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)  
- [**Just Enough Items (JEI)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

> ⚠️ Does **not** work without both dependencies installed.
